title: More Underwater Music
description: Remixes of Minecraft's soundtrack that play underwater.
body:
Adds remixes of various songs from Minecraft's soundtrack that play underwater.

1. Airy-a Math
     (C418 - Aria Math)
 
2. Buoy
     (C418 - Danny)
 
3. Caught Muskie
     (C418 - Haunt Muskie)
 
4. Droopy Like Your Faucet
     (C418 - Droopy Likes Your Face)
 
5. Floating Memories
     (Kumi Tanioka - Comforting Memories)
 
6. Mice on Neptune
     (C418 - Mice on Venus)
 
7. Moog Sea
     (C418 - Moog City 2)
 
8. Subnautic Lullaby
     (C418 - Subwoofer Lullaby)
 
9. Sunken Clocks
      (Amos Roddy - Broken Clocks)
 
10. Waterbugs
      (Amos Roddy - Fireflies)
 
11. Wetter Hands
      (C418 - Wet Hands)
